title: Iowa Association of Disability Examiners — By-Laws
description: By-Laws of the Iowa Association of Disability Examiners, a chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) located in Des Moines at the State Disability Agency. Articles I-XI cover name, affiliation, definitions, purpose, membership (NADE members working or residing in Iowa), finances (no chapter dues; rebates per regional policy), the Executive Board, officers (President/Vice-President/Secretary-Treasurer for one-year terms plus a Representative to the Regional Board), annual meetings governed by Robert's Rules of Order, standing committees (Membership, Program, Nominations), and amendment by two-thirds vote.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Iowa Chapter
source.title: By-Laws of the Iowa Association of Disability Examiners

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'Iowa-Const-Bylaws.doc' in the same directory; expect conversion/OCR-style artifacts (e.g. 'lowa' for Iowa, 'Present' for President, 'COMMITTIES'/'AMMENDMENTS' misspellings, and a stray table-cell character '|'). Despite the source filename, the content is a By-Laws document (no separately titled Constitution section is present). No adoption/revision date is stated in the content, so temporal_coverage is omitted. The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link.
